## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name uses an approved prefix (`codex/`, `feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Changes are scoped and reversible
- [ ] I documented validation steps or explained why none were needed
- [ ] I updated the owning team log before opening or updating this PR
- [ ] I listed follow-up work or confirmed there is none
